title: Sudamerlycaste priscilae
taxonomy: Sudamerlycaste priscilae is classified within the family Orchidaceae and is a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. More specifically, it is placed within the tribe Maxillarieae. This species is also a member of the subtribe Maxillardiinae. Sudamerlycaste priscilae is a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to South America. It is an epiphytic plant that grows in tropical and subtropical regions.
